_comment: Manual synonym table. Maps alias names -> canonical name. Used by build_graph.py to deduplicate clearly-equivalent phenomena that V1/V2/V3 split across multiple Chinese phrasings. Conservative: only merge when the shared_equation and domain strongly overlap.
